TEST CASE ID: Verify Manage Report Schedules Dashboard Summary (Read-Only Cards) Verify summary section in Manage Report Schedules page
Precondition: User is logged in and has access to Dashboard → Settings → Reports
TEST STEPS:
*Go to Dashboard

*Navigate to Settings

*Click on “Report”

*Click on “Manage Report Schedules”
EXPECTED RESULT:
The following summary fields appear at the top of the page:

Active Schedules

Reports Sent This Month

Failed Deliveries

All fields are displayed correctly

Fields are read-only

User cannot click or interact with them

TEST CASE ID: Verify Create New Schedule Button(Verify user can create a new report schedule)
Precondition: User is on Manage Report Schedules page
TEST STEPS:
*Click on “Create New Schedule”

*Fill required fields

*Click Save/*Create
EXPECTED RESULT:
New schedule is created successfully

Created schedule appears in the table below

Success message is displayed

TEST CASE ID:
Verify Schedule Table Columns
Verify schedule table structure after creating schedule
TEST STEPS:
*Navigate to Manage Report Schedules page

*Observe the schedule table
EXPECTED RESULT:
The table contains the following columns:
Schedule
Customers
Site
Actions

TEST CASE ID:
Verify Actions Column Functionality
Verify actions (Edit / Delete / Trigger) functionality
TEST STEPS:
*Click on Edit
*Modify data and save
*Click on Delete
*Click on Trigger
EXPECTED RESULT:
Edit updates schedule successfully

Delete removes schedule after confirmation

Trigger manually sends the report successfully

TEST CASE ID:
Verify Rows Per Page Functionality
Verify Rows Per Page option in schedule table
TEST STEPS:
*Locate “Rows per page” option

*Change number of rows displayed
EXPECTED RESULT:
Table updates dynamically

Correct number of rows is displayed per selection
